notes: Chapter-scoped Gym/E4 Prep (deck slot 5) for c13: 1 leader(s). Per leader, one challenge-constraint item (level cap + Set/Johto-only/no-Pack-items rules; sourced from the achievements dataset, src-ra) and one recommended-counter item paraphrased from the RA community wiki (src-ra-wiki).

Level caps and challenge framing are the per-leader Johto-only achievements (ra-id 199603-199619/199632). Recommendations reproduce the wiki's advice faithfully; none invented where the wiki gives none.
